businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker pivoting to a 'Physical AI Platform' spanning robotaxis, humanoid robots, and energy storage
businessSummary.description: Tesla is rapidly transforming from an EV manufacturer into an integrated AI, robotics, and energy platform company. FY2025 revenue was $94.8B, marking its first-ever annual revenue decline (-2.9%), with net income plunging 46.5%. France and Norway saw February market share rebounds, signaling stabilization in Europe after two straight years of declining sales. Cybertruck's new base AWD trim saw explosive demand, pushing deliveries to 2027. FSD transfer policy changed (3/31 deadline). 2026 Model 3 interior upgrades leaked. P/E 374.83x, Forward P/E 153.78x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Vehicle Sales: ~73% of revenue ($69.5B). Model 3/Y core, Model S/X discontinuing Q2 2026
Energy: ~14% of revenue ($12.8B, +27% YoY). Megapack utility-scale storage
Services/Other: ~13% of revenue ($12.5B). Supercharger network, insurance, maintenance
FSD Subscription: $99/month autonomous driving software (subscription-only since Feb 2026)
keyProducts: Cybertruck (New base AWD with explosive demand, deliveries pushed to 2027)
Optimus (Humanoid robot, Fremont factory conversion underway)
Megapack (Utility-scale energy storage, Megapack 3 and Mega Block launching 2026)

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extremely elevated due to earnings decline. Reflects AI/robotaxi premium

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS $2.62 forecast. Still in overvalued territory

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth
keyMetrics.interpretation: First-ever annual revenue decline. FY2026 +11.25% rebound expected

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Down from 7.84% in FY2024. Price competition and R&D expansion impact

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Declined sharply with earnings. Down from 7.84% in FY2024

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Slight improvement from FY2024's 17.86%. Holding up despite China price war

growthDrivers.title: France & Norway Market Share Rebounds in February — Europe Stabilization Signal
growthDrivers.description: Per Reuters, Tesla regained market share in France and Norway in February. First stabilization signs after two consecutive years of European sales decline.

growthDrivers.title: Cybertruck New Base AWD Explosive Demand — Deliveries Pushed to 2027
growthDrivers.description: Tesla's new base trim saw such strong demand that estimated delivery timelines were pushed to 2027. Lineup expansion strategy validated.

growthDrivers.title: 2026 Model 3 Interior Upgrades Leaked
growthDrivers.description: EU/Asia-Pacific 2026 Model 3 to receive new screen and headliner borrowed from Model Y. Product competitiveness boost.

growthDrivers.title: FSD Transfer Policy Change — March 31 Deadline
growthDrivers.description: Tesla changed FSD transfer policy requiring delivery by 3/31. Expected to drive Q1 purchase acceleration and revenue boost.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 50%+ US EV market share leader. Globally overtaken by BYD. Software, manufacturing, energy vertical integration and 8.2B autonomous driving miles are the core moats.

moats.description: FSD Supervised 8.2 billion miles. Overwhelming training dataset vs. competitors.
In-house battery (4680), custom chips (HW4), software (FSD), charging infrastructure (Supercharger).
NACS is the North American EV charging standard. GM, Ford, Rivian rely on Tesla's Supercharger network.

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: 2025 global EV sales leader. Surging in Europe, tariffs limiting US entry

competitors.name: Rivian (RIVN)
competitors.detail: R2 SUV ($45,000) launching 2026, directly competing with Model Y

competitors.name: Xiaomi
competitors.detail: YU7 SUV outselling Model Y 2:1 in China

recentNews.headline: Tesla Gains Market Share in France and Norway in February
recentNews.significance: First stabilization signal after two years of European decline. Positive start to 2026.

recentNews.headline: Forbes: What Could Trigger The Next Breakout In Tesla Stock?
recentNews.significance: Analysis of historical pattern where TSLA rallied 30%+ within two months on 18 occasions.

recentNews.headline: Cybertruck $59,990 Base Trim Gone — New Base Sees Explosive Demand, 2027 Delivery
recentNews.significance: Strong demand pushed delivery timelines to 2027. Cybertruck lineup strategy success.

recentNews.headline: Tesla Changes FSD Transfer Policy — March 31 Deadline
recentNews.significance: FSD transfer deadline set to 3/31, creating Q1 purchase acceleration effect.

recentNews.headline: 2026 Model 3 Major Interior Upgrades Leaked (EU/APAC)
recentNews.significance: New screen and headliner borrowed from Model Y for enhanced product competitiveness.

analystOpinions.notableComment: 30 analysts, Hold consensus. Dan Ives (Wedbush) $600 high, GLJ Research $25 low. Tigress Financial resumed at Strong Buy $550. Morgan Stanley Hold at $415.

risks.title: Europe 13 Consecutive Months of Sales Decline (Jan -17% YoY)
risks.description: 13 straight months of decline through January. BYD registrations +165% in January widening the gap. Musk's political statements fueling European consumer backlash.

risks.title: P/E 374.83x — Extreme Overvaluation
risks.description: Even Forward P/E 153.78x is extremely expensive vs. market. EPS $1.08, down 47% YoY. Sharp correction risk if robotaxi/AI premium isn't justified.

risks.title: China Competition Intensifying — Xiaomi and BYD Offensive
risks.description: Xiaomi YU7 outselling Model Y 2:1 in China. BYD ATTO 3 and other low-cost EVs eroding market share.

risks.title: FY2025 First-Ever Revenue Decline and Earnings Plunge
risks.description: Revenue -2.9%, net income -46.5%. Operating margin dropped to 4.59%. Side effects of price-cutting strategy.

risks.title: Musk Political Risk — DOGE and European Backlash
risks.description: Elon Musk's DOGE involvement and political statements accelerating European and some US consumer defection.

buyReasons.title: Europe Stabilization Signal — France & Norway Share Rebound
buyReasons.rationale: First share recovery in two key markets after two years of decline. 2026 Model Y refresh and pricing adjustments taking effect.

buyReasons.title: Cybertruck Demand Explosion — Deliveries Pushed to 2027
buyReasons.rationale: Strong demand for new base trim pushed deliveries to 2027. Lineup expansion strategy proven successful.

buyReasons.title: Robotaxi & AI Platform Value — Cybercab Production Underway
buyReasons.rationale: Cybercab full production starting April, H1 robotaxi expansion to 9 US cities. Core thesis behind Dan Ives' $600 target.

buyReasons.title: Energy Business High Growth Continues — Megapack 3 Launch Imminent
buyReasons.rationale: Energy revenue $12.8B (+27% YoY). Megapack 3 and Mega Block launching 2026 for high-margin growth.

overallOpinion: Mar 2 close $403.32 (+0.20%). France & Norway market share rebound signals Europe stabilization. Cybertruck new trim explosive demand pushing deliveries to 2027. 2026 Model 3 interior upgrade leaked.
30 analysts: 16 Buy, Hold consensus. Average target $396 (-1.78%). Dan Ives $600 vs GLJ $25 — extreme opinion divergence. Forward P/E 153.78x remains elevated.
$403.32 below 50-day MA $434, above 200-day MA $391. RSI 41.75 neutral. 200-day MA $391 support is the key short-term pivot.
